import policyText from "./0fbcb3a47a6103fbcc4250cb4441e33f2b6f36d4-token-policy.rules.json";
var index_default = {
  fetch() {
    return new Response(JSON.stringify({
      constructor: policyText.constructor.name,
      parsed: JSON.parse(policyText),
      text: policyText,
      type: typeof policyText
    }));
  }
};
export {
  index_default as default
};

  This usually means a sandbox or security policy is preventing network access.

  agent, etc.),

[218] assistant: The sandbox blocks binding the local dev server to loopback, so IвҖҷm rerunning that one command with escalation. The server will only bind to `127.0.0.1` for the runtime type check.
